ArenaModes.Name: PvP Standard
ArenaModes.Description: Challenge other players or alien lifeforms in simulated Creature Battles!

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle Nexus PvE
ArenaModes.Description: Defeat Iteration: Oceanus on the Space Anomaly in battles to earn Challenger Invites. Oceanus is a formidable opponent, and each day, they offer an especially tough battle to all Travellers across the galaxies.

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle Planet Standard
ArenaModes.Description: A nearby Arena League Challenger has invited you to battle

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle System Standard
ArenaModes.Description: A nearby Arena League Challenger has invited you to battle

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle System Champion
ArenaModes.Description: The local Arena League Champion has invited you to a Creature Battle.

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle Settlement
ArenaModes.Description: Compete at Holo-Arenas on planets and Space Stations.

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle Largebuilding
ArenaModes.Description: A nearby Arena League Challenger has invited you to battle

ArenaModes.Name: Petbattle Pirates
ArenaModes.Description: A nearby Arena League Challenger has invited you to battle

ArenaLeague.MedalDescription: Seek out Holo-Arenas on planets and Space Stations throughout the galaxy.
Each day Iteration: Oceanus hosts a unique Holo-Arena battle. Their battle team for that day is consistent for all Travellers.
ArenaLeague.WikiDescription: Defeat Iteration: Oceanus on the Space Anomaly

PetShop.Name: Aeron Crab Egg
PetShop.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

Laid by a soft-skinned crustacean, this species has evolved a synergistic relationship with Travellers, occupying the discarded shells of slain Sentinel Quadrupeds.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be shy and migratory.

PetShop.Name: Wandering Shrimp Tank Egg
PetShop.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

Part robotic, part organic, part liquid. The primitive anatomy of this creature's conscious organ belies a deep, calculating intelligence.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be focused and strategic.

PetShop.Name: Boundary Horror Egg
PetShop.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

It wails, sleepless.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be haunting and adrift.

PetShop.Name: Corrupted Quad Egg
PetShop.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

The shell crackles with an electronic energy; mutated by Atlantideum, neutralised by [ redacted ].

Scans indicate the being within is programmed to be tireless and gLaSs.

PetShop.Name: Geno-prawn Egg
PetShop.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

The serpentine foetus stares directly through the membrane of its egg. It watches. It waits.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be unblinking and slithering.

ArenaGuild.Name: Arena League
ArenaGuild.Description:
United by an enthusiasm for all things zoological and sharing a keen competitive streak, members of the Arena League roam the galaxy seeking new life to tame, nurture and train.

Members can be found at Holo-Arenas on planets and Space Stations challenging one another to prove which of them has raised the most powerful, well-trained Companions in simulated battles between their creatures. They are always accepting of new challengers, though Travellers will have to prove themselves before they can expect to take on the toughest competitors.
